constructors.name: GH_DocumentObject(IGH_InstanceDescription)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_DocumentObject class

constructors.name: GH_DocumentObject(String, String, String, String)
constructors.signature: protected GH_DocumentObject(string name, string nickname, string description, string category)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_DocumentObject class

constructors.name: GH_DocumentObject(String, String, String, String, String)
constructors.signature: protected GH_DocumentObject(string name, string nickName, string description, string category, string subCategory)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_DocumentObject class

methods.name: AddedToDocument
methods.summary: This method will be called when an object is added to a document. Override this method if you want to handle such events.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that now owns this object.

methods.name: AppendMenuItems
methods.summary: This function is called when a context menu is about to be displayed. Override it to set custom items.

returns.doc: If true, the menu will be displayed, if false the menu will be supressed.

methods.name: CopyFrom
methods.summary: Copy all fields (except the instance ID) from another instance description.

methods.name: CreateAttributes
methods.summary: This function creates the stand-alone attributes for this object. If you wish to supply your own Attributes, you must override this function.

methods.name: DestroyIconCache
methods.summary: Call this method to erase the existing icon cache. You must call this if you want to change the display icon of an object.

methods.name: DocumentContextChanged
methods.signature: public virtual void DocumentContextChanged(GH_Document document, GH_DocumentContext context)
methods.summary: This method will be called when the document that owns this object moves into a different context.

methods.name: ExpirePreview
methods.summary: Call this function when you suspect that the preview has expired for this object. This will cause the display cache to be eradicated.

methods.name: ExpireSolution
methods.summary: Call this function whenever you do something which expires the current solution. This will make sure all caches are erased, all downstream objects are expired and that the event is raised. The default implementation merely places a call to OnSolutionExpired(), override this function in derived classes to make sure you clear local data caches and expire downstream objects.

params.name: recompute
params.doc: If True, the solution will be recomputed straight away.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Boolean)
methods.signature: protected bool GetValue(string valueName, bool default)
methods.summary: Get a boolean value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The boolean value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Double)
methods.signature: protected double GetValue(string valueName, double default)
methods.summary: Get a double value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The double value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Color)
methods.signature: protected Color GetValue(string valueName, Color default)
methods.summary: Get a color value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The color value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Int32)
methods.signature: protected int GetValue(string valueName, int default)
methods.summary: Get an integer value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The integer value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, String)
methods.signature: protected string GetValue(string valueName, string default)
methods.summary: Get a string value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The string value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: HtmlHelp_Source
methods.summary: Return a String which contains HTML formatted source for the help topic. If you want to pass a URL that points to a remote page, then prefix the URL with a GOTO: tag, like so: GOTO:http://www.YourWebAddressHere.com
methods.remarks: You can use the GUI.GH_HtmlFormatter class to generate an HTML page which conforms to Grasshopper Help standards

methods.name: IsolateObject
methods.summary: Destroy all connections to other objects.

methods.name: Menu_AppendColourPicker
methods.signature: public static GH_ColourPicker Menu_AppendColourPicker(ToolStripDropDown menu, Color colour, GH_DocumentObject.ColourEventHandler colourChanged)
methods.summary: Add a colour picker to a menu.

params.name: colourChanged
params.doc: Handler for Colour picker changed events.

returns.doc: Menu item representing the colour picker.

methods.name: Menu_AppendCustomItem(ToolStripDropDown, Control)
methods.signature: public static bool Menu_AppendCustomItem(ToolStripDropDown menu, Control control)
methods.summary: Utility function for inserting exotic controls into dropdown menus.

params.name: menu
params.doc: Dropdown to add a control to.

methods.name: Menu_AppendCustomItem(ToolStripDropDown, Control, KeyDownEventHandler)
methods.signature: public static bool Menu_AppendCustomItem(ToolStripDropDown menu, Control control, KeyDownEventHandler keydown)
methods.summary: Utility function for inserting exotic controls into dropdown menus.

params.name: menu
params.doc: Dropdown to add a control to.

methods.name: Menu_AppendCustomItem(ToolStripDropDown, Control, KeyDownEventHandler, Boolean, Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static bool Menu_AppendCustomItem(ToolStripDropDown menu, Control control, KeyDownEventHandler keydown, bool enabled, int width, bool lockOnFocus)
methods.summary: Utility function for inserting exotic controls into dropdown menus.

params.name: menu
params.doc: Dropdown to add a control to.

params.name: enabled
params.doc: If true, the control will be enabled.

params.name: lockOnFocus
params.doc: If true and the control gets focus, the rest of the menu will be locked.

methods.name: Menu_AppendDigitScrollerItem
methods.signature: public static GH_DigitScrollerBase Menu_AppendDigitScrollerItem(ToolStripDropDown menu, decimal min, decimal max, decimal value, int decimals)
methods.summary: Utility function for inserting a digit scroller into menus.

returns.doc: The digit scroller object that was inserted into the menu.

methods.name: Menu_AppendGenericMenuItem
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is obsolete")] public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendGenericMenuItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler on_click = null, Image image = null, Object tag = null, bool enabled = true, bool checked = false)
methods.summary: This method is obsolete.

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

returns.doc: The appended item

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String, EventHandler)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler click)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

params.name: click
params.doc: Delegate that handles click events. If nothing, the click event will not be handled.

returns.doc: The appended item

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String, EventHandler, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler click, bool enabled)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

params.name: click
params.doc: Delegate that handles click events. If nothing, the click event will not be handled.

params.name: enabled
params.doc: If true, the item will be enabled.

returns.doc: The appended item

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String, EventHandler, Image)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler click, Image icon)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

params.name: click
params.doc: Delegate that handles click events. If nothing, the click event will not be handled.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Item icon, or null for no icon.

returns.doc: The appended item

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String, EventHandler, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler click, bool enabled, bool checked)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

params.name: click
params.doc: Delegate that handles click events. If nothing, the click event will not be handled.

params.name: enabled
params.doc: If true, the item will be enabled.

params.name: checked
params.doc: If true, the item will be checked.

returns.doc: The appended item

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String, EventHandler, Image, Object)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler click, Image icon, Object tag)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

params.name: click
params.doc: Delegate that handles click events. If nothing, the click event will not be handled.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Item icon, or null for no icon.

params.name: tag
params.doc: Tag to assign to menu item.

returns.doc: The appended item

methods.name: Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip, String, EventHandler, Image, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripMenuItem Menu_AppendItem(ToolStrip menu, string text, EventHandler click, Image icon, bool enabled, bool checked)
methods.summary: Utility function for appending generic menu items.

params.name: enabled
params.doc: If true, the item will be enabled.

params.name: checked
params.doc: If true, the item will be checked.

returns.doc: The appended item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendObjectHelp
methods.summary: Appends the default object Help menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendObjectName
methods.summary: Appends the old-fashioned object name menu item. If you also want the Display mode toggle then use Menu_AppendObjectNameEx()

methods.name: Menu_AppendObjectNameEx
methods.summary: Appends the default object name + display mode menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendPublish
methods.summary: Appends the default item for publishing to RCP. This menu will only appear if the current class implement IRcpAwareObject

methods.name: Menu_AppendSeparator
methods.summary: Utility function for appending separators to a menu dropdown. If the dropdown is empty or if it already has a separator at the bottom, nothing will happen.

returns.doc: The appended separator or null if no separator was appended.

methods.name: Menu_AppendTextItem(ToolStripDropDown, String, GH_MenuTextBox.KeyDownEventHandler, GH_MenuTextBox.TextChangedEventHandler, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripTextBox Menu_AppendTextItem(ToolStripDropDown menu, string text, GH_MenuTextBox.KeyDownEventHandler keydown, GH_MenuTextBox.TextChangedEventHandler textchanged, bool lockOnFocus)
methods.summary: Utility function for inserting text boxes into menus.

params.name: menu
params.doc: Menu to add a textbox to.

params.name: lockOnFocus
params.doc: If true, then a GotFocus event will lock the other menu items.

returns.doc: The appended text box item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendTextItem(ToolStripDropDown, String, GH_MenuTextBox.KeyDownEventHandler, GH_MenuTextBox.TextChangedEventHandler, Boolean, Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static ToolStripTextBox Menu_AppendTextItem(ToolStripDropDown menu, string text, GH_MenuTextBox.KeyDownEventHandler keydown, GH_MenuTextBox.TextChangedEventHandler textchanged, bool enabled, int width, bool lockOnFocus)
methods.summary: Utility function for inserting text boxes into menus.

params.name: menu
params.doc: Menu to add a textbox to.

params.name: enabled
params.doc: If true, the textbox will be enabled.

params.name: width
params.doc: If larger than zero, we'll do our very best to grow the menu to the given width. No guarantees.

params.name: lockOnFocus
params.doc: If true, then a GotFocus event will lock the other menu items.

returns.doc: The appended text box item.

methods.name: Menu_MoveItem(ToolStripItem, String[])
methods.signature: public static bool Menu_MoveItem(ToolStripItem item, params string[] precedingItems)
methods.summary: Utility function for moving menu items.

params.name: item
params.doc: Item to move, it must already be part of a dropdown menu.

params.name: precedingItems
params.doc: Names of preceding items, the item will be inserted below the first name, if that fails the second, etc. etc.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Menu_MoveItem(ToolStripItem, Boolean, String[])
methods.signature: public static bool Menu_MoveItem(ToolStripItem item, bool insertBelow, params string[] targets)
methods.summary: Utility function for moving menu items.

params.name: item
params.doc: Item to move, it must already be part of the dropdown menu.

params.name: insertBelow
params.doc: If true, the item will be inserted below the match, if false, above the match.

params.name: targets
params.doc: Names of move to targets, the item will be inserted next to the first name, if that fails the second, etc. etc.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: MovedBetweenDocuments
methods.signature: public virtual void MovedBetweenDocuments(GH_Document oldDocument, GH_Document newDocument)
methods.summary: This method will be called when an object is moved from one document to another. Override this method if you want to handle such events.

params.name: oldDocument
params.doc: Document that used to own this object.

params.name: newDocument
params.doc: Document that now owns ths object.

methods.name: NewInstanceGuid()
methods.summary: Generate a new random instance GUID

methods.name: NewInstanceGuid(Guid)
methods.summary: Set the instance ID to be a specific GUID. This is very dangerous, only use this function if you're 6"4' and your first name is David.

methods.name: OnAttributesChanged
methods.summary: Raises the AttributesChanged event on the toplevel object.

methods.name: OnDisplayExpired
methods.summary: Raises the DisplayExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: redraw
params.doc: If True, the canvas will be immediately redrawn.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(String, Object)
methods.signature: public void OnObjectChanged(string customEvent, Object tag)

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType, Object)
methods.signature: public void OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType eventType, Object tag)

methods.name: OnPingDocument
methods.summary: Raise the PingDocument Event on the toplevel object and try to find the document which owns this object.

returns.doc: The document which owns this object if successful, or nothing if no document owns this object.

methods.name: OnPreviewExpired
methods.summary: Raises the PreviewExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: redraw
params.doc: If True, the viewports will be immediately redrawn.

methods.name: OnSolutionExpired
methods.summary: Raises the SolutionExpired event on the toplevel object. You probably want to call ExpireSolution() instead of this method directly.

params.name: recompute
params.doc: If True, the solution will be immediately recalculated.

methods.name: Read
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_InstanceDescription.Read(GH_IReader).)

methods.name: ReadFull
methods.summary: GH_InstanceDescription does not by default serialize all fields. Use this function to read all fields from the archive. This method is compatible with the default Write()/Read() operations.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(String)
methods.summary: Record a generic object change undo event.

returns.doc: The ID of the newly added record or Guid.Empty on failure.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(GH_UndoRecord)
methods.summary: Record an entire undo record.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(String, IGH_UndoAction)
methods.signature: public Guid RecordUndoEvent(string undoName, IGH_UndoAction action)
methods.summary: Record a specific object change undo event.

returns.doc: The ID of the newly added record or Guid.Empty on failure.

methods.name: RemovedFromDocument
methods.summary: This method will be called when an object is removed from a document. Override this method if you want to handle such events.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that now no longer owns this object.

methods.name: SetIconOverride
methods.summary: Set a new custom icon override for this object.

params.name: customIcon
params.doc: Icon override. Should be a 24x24 image.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Boolean)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, bool value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Double)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, double value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Color)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, Color value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Int32)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, int value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, String)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, string value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave()
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with the object_changed flag.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(Guid)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with the object_changed flag.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of autosave event. Consecutive autosave requests with the same ID will be ignored.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with a custom flag.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for the autosave operation. It is possible that a user has decided to avoid autosave events for specific types, so if you can, try and provide a correct trigger flag.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger, Guid)
methods.signature: public void TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger trigger, Guid id)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with a custom flag.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for the autosave operation. It is possible that a user has decided to avoid autosave events for specific types, so if you can, try and provide a correct trigger flag.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of autosave event. Consecutive autosave requests with the same ID will be ignored.

methods.name: ValuesChanged
methods.summary: Override this method if you want to respond to changes to the value table. The base implementation is empty, so you don't have to call it.

methods.name: Write
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_InstanceDescription.Write(GH_IWriter).)

methods.name: WriteFull
methods.summary: GH_InstanceDescription does not by default serialize all fields. Use this function to write all fields to the archive. This method is compatible with the default Write()/Read() operations.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the attributes that are associated with this object. Only set custom attributes if you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Category
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Category in which this object belongs. If HasCategory() returns false, this field has no meaning.

properties.name: ComponentGuid
properties.summary: Returns a consistent ID for this object type. Every object must supply a unique and unchanging ID that is used to identify objects of the same type.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: Gets or sets the description of the object. This field typically remains fixed during the lifetime of an object.

properties.name: Exposure
properties.summary: Gets the exposure of this object in the Graphical User Interface. The default is to expose everywhere.

properties.name: HasCategory
properties.summary: Gets whether or not the Category field has been set.

properties.name: HasSubCategory
properties.summary: Gets whether or not the SubCategory field has been set.

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: Override this function to supply a custom icon (24x24 pixels). The result of this property is cached, so don't worry if icon retrieval is not very fast.

properties.name: Icon_24x24
properties.summary: The icon associated with this object.

properties.name: Icon_24x24_Locked
properties.summary: The greyscale icon of this object.

properties.name: IconDisplayMode
properties.summary: Gets the current display mode of the object.

properties.name: InstanceDescription
properties.summary: Gets a description of the current state of the object. This field is usually the same as the Description() field, but it might be variable when overridden.

properties.name: InstanceGuid
properties.summary: Gets the ID of this runtime instance.

properties.name: Keywords
properties.summary: Gets a list of additional keywords that describe the object. Typically this list is empty but you can override this property to aid in object searches.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the object. This field typically remains fixed during the lifetime of an object.

properties.name: NickName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the nickname of the object. This field can be changed by the user.

properties.name: Obsolete
properties.summary: Gets whether this object is obsolete. Default implementation returns true if the class name contains the string "OBSOLETE" or if this class has been decorated with the ObsoleteAttribute. You are free to override this if you want, but I suggest adding the ObsoleteAttribute instead.

properties.name: SubCategory
properties.summary: Gets or sets the SubCategory in which this object belongs. If HasSubCategory() returns false, this field has no meaning.

events.name: AttributesChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever the number or kind of attributes changes. This event is handled by GH_Documents who subsequently wipe their attribute caches.

events.name: DisplayExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the display (on the Canvas) of a certain object becomes invalid.

events.name: PingDocument
events.summary: Raised whenever an object needs to know which GH_Document it belongs to.

events.name: PreviewExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the display (in the Rhino viewports) of a certain object becomes invalid.

events.name: SolutionExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the solution of a certain object becomes invalid.
